faqs.question: How do I know if I have a drain fly infestation in my Rahway home?
faqs.answer: Drain flies are small, fuzzy-looking flies often seen around sinks, showers, and floor drains. You may notice them on bathroom walls or near drains, especially in the evening. They breed in the organic buildup inside drains and are common in Rahway's older homes with aging plumbing systems.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our treatment includes a thorough inspection of all drains, professional bio-enzymatic treatments to eliminate breeding sites, mechanical cleaning where needed, and follow-up recommendations. Pricing varies based on property size, number of drains affected, and severity of infestation.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Rahway properties?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments are completed in 1-2 hours depending on the size of your property and number of affected drains. Results are typically visible within 3-5 days as the breeding cycle is interrupted, with complete elimination achieved within 1-2 weeks.

faqs.question: Can drain flies return after treatment?
faqs.answer: Drain flies can return if organic matter builds up again in drains. We provide detailed prevention tips and maintenance recommendations to keep your Rahway property drain fly-free. Regular drain maintenance and proper cleaning practices significantly reduce the likelihood of re-infestation.
